# Prism

> The ad network purpose-built for AI chatbot conversations. Publishers monetize chat sessions with context-aware native ads; advertisers reach high-intent users in real chatbot dialog.

Prism (prismpublication.com) is a conversational advertising platform. The SDK reads live chatbot conversation context and serves native sponsored recommendations that fit the moment, rather than generic banners. Publishers earn CPM + CPC revenue with monthly payouts; advertisers pay only for genuine engagement.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://prismpublication.com/): Product overview, how it works, FAQ.
- [Product](https://prismpublication.com/product): Full platform overview — SDK, context matching, controls.
- [Use cases](https://prismpublication.com/use-cases): Supported chatbot types and integration patterns.
- [For Publishers](https://prismpublication.com/publishers): SDK install, pacing controls, revenue model.
- [For Advertisers](https://prismpublication.com/advertisers): Intent-level targeting inside live chatbot conversations, brand-safety controls.
- [Interactive Demo](https://prismpublication.com/demo): Two-minute simulated chatbot ad flow, no signup.
- [Documentation](https://prismpublication.com/docs): SDK reference and integration guides.
- [Blog](https://prismpublication.com/blog): Strategy, monetization, and product updates.
- [Ad Policy](https://prismpublication.com/ad-policy): Content and category restrictions.
- [Company](https://prismpublication.com/company): About Prism.
- [Contact](https://prismpublication.com/contact): Talk to the team.

## Key Facts

- Category: Conversational advertising / chatbot monetization SDK
- Supported stacks: OpenAI / GPT, LangChain, Rasa, custom AI agents, GPT wrappers, customer support bots, e-commerce assistants
- Ad formats: Native sponsored recommendations rendered inside the chatbot response
- Targeting: Real-time conversation context (no profile-based tracking)
- Privacy: Contextual signals only; GDPR / CCPA aligned
- Pricing model: CPM + CPC, monthly payouts to publishers
- Publisher controls: Frequency caps, category filters, topic restrictions, pacing rules
- Advertiser controls: Placement controls, brand-safety preferences, category targeting
- Integration: SDK-first, three-line install, supports test mode before broader rollout
- Google Ad Manager (GAM): The SDK can be used together with Google Ad Manager so teams using GAM can test our features without changing their ad stack. We provide runnable example integrations, test ad-unit IDs and sample pages, and step‑by‑step instructions for collecting results using your GAM reports. If you’d like to try a GAM pilot, open an issue labeled `beta-request` or email info@prismpublication.com.

- [Sitemap](https://prismpublication.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL index.
